name: artifi-ee-vat-declaration
description: Estonian VAT return (KMD) for monthly e-MTA filing in the official KMD2 format. Runs a pre-close validation gate (BLOCK/WARN), then generates the KMD2 machine CSV and XSD-validated XML with the KMD INF annex. Locks the tax period after filing. EC Sales List (Form VD) prepared separately for portal entry. Dynamically discovers and classifies tax codes — never hardcoded.
